# PDFBridge
**Invoice verification + deterministic settlement intents for Solana.**

## Overview
PDFBridge is developer infrastructure for invoice settlement. It compiles an invoice into a deterministic execution plan (an "intent"), verifies math + counterparty identity signals, and coordinates on-chain settlement with a reconciled audit trail.

## Public API (Settlement)
Base URL: `https://api.pdfbridge.xyz/api/v1`

### Authentication
Send your API key via:
`x-api-key: pk_live_...` (or `pk_test_...`)

### 1) Compile an Invoice Intent
`POST /compiler/compile-intent` (multipart)

```bash
curl -X POST https://api.pdfbridge.xyz/api/v1/compiler/compile-intent \
  -H "x-api-key: pk_test_your_key_here" \
  -F "file=@invoice.pdf"
```

### 2) Broadcast Settlement (Solana)
`POST /compiler/intent/:id/broadcast`

```bash
curl -X POST https://api.pdfbridge.xyz/api/v1/compiler/intent/INTENT_ID/broadcast \
  -H "x-api-key: pk_live_your_key_here"
```

### 3) Reconcile Finality
`GET /compiler/intent/:documentId/reconcile`

```bash
curl -X GET https://api.pdfbridge.xyz/api/v1/compiler/intent/DOCUMENT_ID/reconcile \
  -H "x-api-key: pk_live_your_key_here"
```

### 4) Ledger
`GET /ledger?limit=10`

```bash
curl -X GET "https://api.pdfbridge.xyz/api/v1/ledger?limit=10" \
  -H "x-api-key: pk_live_your_key_here"
```

## Internal-Only (Not Public)
Legacy document rendering endpoints (URL/HTML to PDF conversion) are internal utilities and are not part of the public settlement surface.
